pattern: Scan from the right: skip the trailing spaces, then count characters until the next space, so the answer is found without splitting the whole string.
hints: Trailing spaces are noise - the last word may not sit flush at the end of the string.
Work backwards from the final character so you never have to look past the last word.
From the end, advance past any spaces, then count consecutive non-space characters until you hit a space or the start of the string.

edge_inputs.description: leading and trailing spaces around short words
single word with a single trailing space
one word, no spaces at all
many trailing spaces after the last word

stress.description: long string of random words separated and padded with runs of spaces
stress.note: always contains at least one word as the problem guarantees
